tcws.areas_raw: Batanes, Cagayan including Babuyan Islands, Isabela, the northeastern portion of Quirino (Maddela), Apayao, the northern portion of Abra (Tineg, Lagayan, Danglas, San Juan, Lagangilang, Licuan -Baay, Malibcong, Lacub, Daguioman, Dolores, La Paz), Kalinga, the eastern portion of Mountain Province (Natonin, Paracelis), the eastern portion of Ifugao (Aguinaldo, Alfonso Lista), Ilocos Norte, the northern portion of Aurora (Dilasag, Casiguran), and the northern and central portions of Catanduanes (Pandan, Caramoran, Bagamanoc, Panganiban, Viga, Gigmoto, Baras, San Miguel)
tcws.potential_impact: Minimal to minor threat to life and property. Highest possible signal mentioned by PAGASA should be checked in latest bulletin.

rainfall.details_raw: WEATHER ADVISORY NO. 11 For: Tropical Cyclone INDAY and Southwest MonsoonIssued at: 5:00 AM, 09 July 2026 Heavy rainfall outlook due to Tropical Cyclone INDAY ForecastRainfall Today Tomorrow Saturday (July 11) Potential Impacts (>200 mm) - - - Widespread incidents of severe floodingand landslides expected. (100 – 200mm) - - - Numerous flooding events are likely,especially in areas that are urbanized, lowlying, or near rivers.Landslide likely in moderate to highlysusceptible areas. (50 – 100 mm) - Batanes - Localized flooding is possible mainly inareas that are urbanized, low lying, or nearrivers.Landslide possible in highly susceptibleareas. Heavy rainfall outlook due to Southwest Monsoon ForecastRainfall Today Tomorrow Saturday (July 11) Potential Impacts (>200 mm) - - - Widespread incidents of severeflooding and landslides expected. (100 – 200mm) - Occidental Mindoro andAntique Occidental Mindoro and Antique Numerous flooding events are likely,especially in areas that areurbanized, low lying, or near rivers.Landslide likely in moderate to highlysusceptible areas. (50 – 100mm) OccidentalMindoro,Antique, andNegrosOccidental Zambales, Bataan,Palawan, Iloilo,Guimaras, NegrosOccidental, NegrosOriental, Zamboangadel Sur, Lanao delNorte, and Lanao delSur Pangasinan, La Union,Zambales, Bataan, Pampanga,Bulacan, Metro Manila, Rizal,Cavite, Batangas, OrientalMindoro, Romblon, Palawan,Aklan, Capiz, Iloilo, Guimaras,Negros Occidental, and NegrosOriental Localized flooding is possible mainlyin areas that are urbanized, low lying,or near rivers.Landslide possible in highlysusceptible areas. Forecast rainfall may be higher in mountainous and elevated areas. Moreover, impacts in some areas may be worsened by significantantecedent rainfall. The public disaster risk reduction and management offices concerned are advised to take all necessary measure to protect life and property.PAGASA Regional Services Divisions may issue Heavy Rainfall Warnings/Thunderstorms Advisories, and other severe weather informationspecific to their areas of responsibility as appropriate. Unless significant changes occur, the next Weather Advisory will be issued at 11:00 AM today. PREPARED BY: LMAL CHECKED BY: RBB WFS-07 Rev.2/09-09-2024 "tracking the sky ...helping the country" Weather and Flood Forecasting CenterSenator Miriam P. Defensor-Santiago AvenueBrgy. Central, Quezon City 1100, Philippines Tel. No.: (+632) 8284-0800 ext. 4800 Website:https://bagong.pagasa.dost.gov.ph

marine.valid_until: the next warning at 05:00 PM today
marine.affected_seaboards_raw: MMSS-02 Rev.1/24-06-2024 Republic of the PhilippinesDEPARTMENT OF SCIENCE AND TECHNOLOGYPhilippine Atmospheric, Geophysical and AstronomicalServices Administration (PAGASA)Weather Division GALE WARNING NR. 3 For: Strong to Gale-Force winds associated with Tropical Cyclone "INDAY" {BAVI} Issued at 05:00 AM Today, 09 July 2026 Valid for broadcast until the next warning at 05:00 PM today. Strong to Gale-Force winds are prevailing or expected to affect the following areas: Seaboards Weather Winds (km/h / kt) Sea Condition Wave Height THE NORTHERN AND EASTERN SEABOARDS OF LUZON (Batanes, the northern and eastern coasts of Cagayan {Buguey, Santa Teresita, Gonzaga, Santa Ana, Gattaran, Lal-Lo, Baggao, Peñablanca} including Babuyan Islands, Isabela, the northern coast of Aurora {Dilasag, Casiguran}, Pollilo Islands {the northern coast of Panukulan, Burdeos, the eastern coast of Patnanungan, and the northern and eastern coasts of Jomalig}, the eastern coast of Camarines Norte {Jose Panganiban, Capalonga, Paracale, Vinzons, Talisay, Daet, Mercedes}, and the northern and eastern coasts of Catanduanes {Pandan, Viga, Bagamanoc, Panganiban, Gigmoto}) Rains with gusty winds (45-68) / (29-36) rough to very rough 2.8-5.0 m THE EASTERN SEABOARD OF VISAYAS (The northern and eastern coast of Northern Samar {Laoang, Palapag, Mapanas, Gamay, Lapinig}) Cloudy skies with scattered rains and thunderstorms (45-63) / (24-34) rough to very rough 2.8-4.5 m Warnings are for sea areas within 30 nautical miles from the coast. Sea travel is risky for small seacrafts (including all motor bancas of any type or tonnage). Mariners of these vessels are advised to remain in port or seek safe harbor. For larger vessels, operating in these conditions required experience and properly equipped vessels. Vessel masters, boat captains, ship owners / operators, and Coast Guard units concerned are advised to take appropriate measures to ensure safety of life at sea. Unless there is an intermediate issuance, the next warning will be issued at 05:00 PM today. Prepared by:MACD Checked by:RBB (02) 8284-08-00 local 4801 www.pagasa.dost.gov.ph "Tracking the sky... helping the country." Weather and Flood Forecasting Center Senator Miriam P. Defensor-Santiago AvenueBrgy. Central, Quezon City, Philippines 1100

cpf_risk_matrix.commodity_affected: Feeds, silo/bulk feeds, live animals, RM transfers
cpf_risk_matrix.main_hazard: TCWS No. 1; strong winds; exposed coastal/upland route risk
cpf_risk_matrix.remarks: Validate road passability, wind exposure, receiving readiness, GPS status, and contractor readiness before release.

cpf_risk_matrix.area_route: Eastern/northern seaboards of Luzon and eastern Visayas
cpf_risk_matrix.main_hazard: Gale warning / rough to very rough seas
cpf_risk_matrix.remarks: Hold small seacraft/motorbanca-dependent movement; validate larger vessels with Coast Guard, ports, and shipping lines.

cpf_risk_matrix.main_hazard: TCWS No. 1 plus Isabela seaboard exposure
cpf_risk_matrix.remarks: Dispatch only after local route, contractor, and receiving confirmation.

cpf_risk_matrix.area_route: Gerona / Tarlac hub and Central Luzon outbound routes
cpf_risk_matrix.main_hazard: Downstream northbound/eastbound/western corridors may be affected by wind, rain, or marine advisories
cpf_risk_matrix.remarks: Coordinate route validation for affected corridors; update Affected Delivery Updates file.

cpf_risk_matrix.area_route: NCR / CALABARZON / Bataan / Zambales / Bulacan / Pampanga
cpf_risk_matrix.main_hazard: Habagat rainfall/gust watch; possible flooding/visibility reduction
cpf_risk_matrix.remarks: Check flood-prone roads, receiving delays, and route restrictions before release.

cpf_risk_matrix.main_hazard: Monsoon rainfall, flooding/landslide-prone roads, and port disruption risk
cpf_risk_matrix.remarks: Coordinate with contractors, local teams, customers, and port/RORO operators before dispatch.

cpf_risk_matrix.area_route: Mindanao areas under monsoon rainfall/gust watch
cpf_risk_matrix.main_hazard: Gusty conditions and localized flooding/landslide risk
cpf_risk_matrix.remarks: Keep GPS active and report road disruptions immediately.

contractor_advisory: All freight contractors must validate route, weather, road, bridge, and port conditions before dispatch. Keep GPS active, confirm driver/helper readiness, secure cargo, and report flooding, landslides, road closures, port cancellations, low visibility, strong winds, route deviations, vehicle issues, or delivery delays immediately. Do not proceed through unsafe flooded or landslide-prone roads without CPF Logistics clearance.
change_log: Checked PAGASA sources; no material change versus last verified JSON.
reliability_notes: PAGASA is the official source of truth.
Satellite imagery is visual context only and must not override PAGASA values.
Forecast cone is not plotted unless official cone geometry is available.
